title: selaginella perpusilla
intro: Selaginella perpusilla is a species of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as the spikemoss family. It is a type of ancient, vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Selaginella perpusilla plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
